resources.string: I-Chatforia isiza abantu baxhumane ngaphezu kwezilimi, amadivayisi, nemingcele.
Khetha ukuthi imilayezo ibukeka kanjani, nini lapho inyamalala khona, nokuthi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile kanjani.

I-Chatforia iyinhlelo yokuthumela imiyalezo ephephile, esekelwe ezilimini eziningi, enokufihlwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E), ukuhumusha ngokushesha, kanye nokubiza ngomsindo/ividiyo. Injongo yethu ilula: ukusiza abantu baxhumane—ngokuphepha, ngasese, nangaphezu kwezilimi.
Imilayezo ibethwa kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kokuba iphume kuyo.\nUkuguqulela, ukugcinwa kwedatha, nokuvumelanisa amadivayisi kuhlelwe ukunciphisa lokho amaseva ethu angakubona.
Ukubethela kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni nezilawuli zobumfihlo zakhelwe ngaphakathi ku-Chatforia kusukela ekuqaleni.
Ukufinyelela kubo bonke: Ukuguqulela ngokuzenzakalelayo izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100.

Ukuqinisekisa ubumfihlo kuqala: Ukuvalwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni (E2E) ngokujwayelekile.

Siphinde sinikeze isitoko nge-Google AdSense. Ungaqondisa i-Chatforia nge-ID yomshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebenzise ifomu elingezansi ukuthola izixhaso ngqo.

Finyelela kubasebenzisi abathumela imilayezo abazibophezele ngokubeka okunomoya, okuphephile kumkhiqizo. Sinikeza isitoreji sebhanela ezindaweni ezibonakala kakhulu, izixhaso, futhi izipesheli zangaphakathi. Ababhalisile be-Premium ababoni izikhangiso.

Thola inombolo yocingo evikelekile yamahhala ongayisebenzisa ukushayela nokuthumela imiyalezo emhlabeni wonke nge-Wi-Fi noma ngedatha. Jabulela ukuvikelwa kwedatha kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni, imiyalezo ephambayo, nokushayela kwezwi/ividiyo kwe-HD — ngezinsiza ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezikusiza ukuthi uhlale uxhumekile ngaphesheya kwemingcele.

Okungenani izinhlamvu ezi-6. Sebenzisa iphasiwedi eqinile, eyingqayizivele.

Ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudingi ulwazi lobuchwepheshe olunzulu—kudinga nje ukuqaphela, ukucophelela, nokwahlulela okuhle. Ngezindlela ezifanele, ungaxhumana ngokuzethemba nangokuphepha.

Ukuxhumana ku-inthanethi sekwenze kwaba lula kunanini ukuhlangana nabantu emhlabeni wonke. Noma ngabe uthumela imilayezo kubangane, uhlangana nabantu abasha, noma usebenzisana ngobungcweti, amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo adlala indima enkulu ekuphileni kwansuku zonke. Nokho, ukuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubalulekile njengokuhlala uxhumekile.

Enye yemithetho ebaluleke kakhulu yokuphepha ku-inthanethi wukugwema ukwabelana ngolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu olubucayi. Lokhu kuhlanganisa ikheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yakho yezimali, amaphasiwedi, noma yiluphi ulwazi olungakusiza ukukuhlonza olungase lusetshenziswe kabi. Ngisho nasezingxoxweni ezingajwayelekile, kungcono ukuqaphela ukuthi yini oyabelana ngayo nokuthi ubabelana nobani.

Ukuxhumana ngenhlonipho kusiza ukudala indawo ephephile kubo bonke. Gwema ukubamba iqhaza ezingxoxweni eziyingozi noma ezihlambalazayo, futhi qaphela ukuthi amazwi akho angaba namuphi umthelela kwabanye. Ukusebenzisana okuhle kunikela ekuhlangenwe nakho okungcono kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

Amapulatifomu wesimanje wokuthumela imilayezo afana neChatforia anikeza amathuluzi okusiza abasebenzisi ukuthi bahlale bephephile. Izici ezifana nokuvimba, ukubika, nokulawula ubumfihlo zakhelwe ukunikeza abasebenzisi ukulawula okuhlangenwe nakho kwabo. Uma umuntu ezenza ngendlela engafanele noma ekwenza ungakhululekile, kufanele usebenzise lawa mathuluzi ngokushesha.

Abakhohlisi bavame ukusebenzisa amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo ukuze bakhohlise abasebenzisi ukuthi babelane ngolwazi lwabo siqu noma bathumele imali. Qaphela imilayezo ebonakala imihle kakhulu ukuze kube yiqiniso, njengeminikelo engalindelekile, izicelo eziphuthumayo, noma izixhumanisi ongaziqondi. Hlala uqinisekisa ubunikazi bomuntu okhuluma naye ngaphambi kokuthatha noma yiziphi izinyathelo.

Njengoba ukuxhumana kwedijithali kuqhubeka kukhula, ukugcina ukuphepha nokwethenjwa kuba kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngokulandela izindlela eziyisisekelo zokuphepha nokusebenzisa amathuluzi atholakalayo, abasebenzisi bangazuza izinzuzo zokuthumela imilayezo ngenkathi banciphisa ubungozi.

Enye yezinguquko ezinkulu kakhulu ekuxhumaneni ukuncishiswa kwezithiyo zendawo. Abantu manje bangaxhumana nabanye emhlabeni wonke cishe ngesikhathi sangempela. Noma ngabe ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu, ebhizinisini, noma ekubambisaneni, amapulatifomu wokuthumela imilayezo enze ukuthi ibanga lingabi yisithiyo esikhulu.

Ikusasa lokuxhumana komhlaba wonke kungenzeka libe namathuluzi athuthukile, njengokuthumela imilayezo ngosizo lwe-AI, ukuhumusha okuthuthukisiwe, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezithuthukisiwe. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka bukhula, ukuxhumana kuzoqhubeka kuba lula ukuqonda futhi kufinyeleleke kalula.

Ukuxhumana sekuthuthuke ngokushesha emashumini eminyaka ambalwa edlule. Lokho okwakudinga izingcingo noma imihlangano ubuso nobuso manje sekungenziwa ngokushesha ngezinkundla zokuthumela imilayezo. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, ukuxhumana emhlabeni wonke kuya ngokushesha, kuya ngokufinyeleleka kalula, futhi kuya ngokubandakanya wonke umuntu.
Amapulatifomu afana neChatforia ayingxenye yalolu shintsho, asiza abantu baxhumane kalula ngokwezilimi nangemiphetho.

Njengoba ukuxhumana sekuyidijithali kakhulu, ubumfihlo nokuphepha kuya kubaluleka kakhulu. Abasebenzisi bafuna ukuqiniseka ukuthi izingxoxo zabo zivikelwe. Izici ezifana nokufihla imininingwane (encryption) nezilungiselelo ezilawulwa ngumsebenzisi zisiza ukunikeza isipiliyoni sokuxhumana esiphephile kakhulu.

Ijubane liyisici esibalulekile esibumba ukuxhumana kwanamuhla. Abasebenzisi balindele ukuthi imilayezo ihanjiswe ngokushesha, futhi ingqalasizinda yanamuhla isekela lokho okulindelekile. Ukuthumela imilayezo ngesikhathi sangempela kuvumela izingxoxo zemvelo neziguquguqukayo.

Ulimi ngokwesiko beluhlala luyisithiyo esikhulu kakhulu ekuxhumaneni komhlaba wonke. Namuhla, amathuluzi okuhumusha afakwe ngaphakathi asiza ukuvala leli gobe. Amapulatifomu afana neChatforia avumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma izilimi ezahlukene, edala amathuba amasha okuxhumana nokuqonda.
Hlola ukuqonda ngokuxhumana, ukuphepha ku-inthanethi, nokuthi ubuchwepheshe bokuthumela imilayezo buxhumanisa kanjani abantu emhlabeni wonke.

Abantu bathembele kuhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo ukuze baxhumane nsuku zonke nabangane, nomndeni, nabalingani emsebenzini. Noma ngabe kuwukwazisa okusheshayo noma ingxoxo ende, ukuthumela imilayezo kunikeza indlela elula futhi eguquguqukayo yokuhlala uxhumene.

Ukuthumela imilayezo kuyaqhubeka nokuthuthuka ngezinye izici ezintsha ezifana nezimpendulo ezisebenzisa i-AI, ukuhumusha, nokwabelana ngokuqukethwe okuhlukahlukene. Njengoba ubuchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuthuthuka, amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo azoba namandla kakhulu futhi azohlukahluka kakhulu.

Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo axhumanisa abantu emhlabeni wonke. Ngenxa yokufinyelela ku-inthanethi, abasebenzisi bangaxhumana kungakhathalekile indawo abakhona, okwenza kube lula ukwakha ubudlelwano nokusebenzisana emazweni ngamazwe.

Amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo sekuyizinsiza ezibaluleke kakhulu zokuxhumana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela ezingxoxweni zomuntu siqu kuya ekuxhumaneni kwebhizinisi, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuthumela imilayezo zivumela abantu ukuthi bahlale bexhumene ngokushesha nangempumelelo.
I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngale migaqo engqondweni, inikeza isipiliyoni sokuthumela imilayezo esheshayo, ephephile, futhi elula ukuyisebenzisa emhlabeni oxhumene.

Amapulatifomu wesimanje wokuthumela imilayezo agxile ekunikezeni abasebenzisi ukulawula idatha yabo nezingxoxo zabo. Izici ezifana nokufihlwa kwemilayezo, izilungiselelo zobumfihlo, nezilawuli zemilayezo zivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngokuzethemba.

Enye yezinzuzo ezinkulu zama-platform okuthumela imilayezo isivinini sawo. Imilayezo iletwa ngokushesha, ivumela abasebenzisi ukuba baxhumane ngesikhathi sangempela. Leli zinga lokunethezeka lenze ukuthumela imilayezo kube yindlela yokuxhumana ekhethwa abantu abaningi.
Kungani amapulatifomu okuthumela imilayezo ebaluleke kakhulu kunanini ngaphambili
Ukuza kwamakamelo okwamanje kusekela ividiyo kuphela.
Inkonzo yokushayela ayitholakali okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi kamuva.
Ukushayela ividiyo kuyatholakala kuphela kubasebenzisi be-app okwamanje.
Ungafaka kanjani isicelo: Sebenzisa inkinobho engezansi ukuthumela i-imeyili eneresume yakho nezixhumanisi.

Siyithimba elincane elisungulayo elakha i-Chatforia — umlayezo wangasese womhlaba wonke oqala kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android. Uma ukhathalela ubumfihlo, ukufihlwa kwemininingwane, kanye nezipiliyoni zabasebenzisi ezimnandi, singathanda ukuzwa kuwe.

Izindima zokungena ekusunguleni: Umholi we-Full-stack Engineer, i-Backend Engineer (Node.js), Umkhandi we-Frontend/Web (React), Umkhandi we-Mobile (iOS), Umkhandi we-Mobile (Android), Umkhandi we-DevOps/SRE, Umkhandi Wezokuphepha Nokufihla Idatha, Umkhandi Wezokuxhumana (Twilio + eSIM).

• Siza ukwakha isisekelo somlayezo womhlaba wonke omusha.
• Thumela izithuthukisi ezisetshenziswa kuwebhu, ku-iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenza ngqo nomseki ekwakhiweni nasekuqondiseni umkhiqizo.
• Bamba izindawo ezinethonya elikhulu ku-stack: imilayezo, izwi, ividiyo, ukufihla imininingwane, ezokuxhumana, i-AI. n• Joyina ekuqaleni — ngaphambi kokuba isisekelo sabasebenzisi sikhule.

Sebenzisa leli thabhu kuphela kubasebenzisi abakhona be-Chatforia.
Chatforia isebenzisa ama-cookie ambalwa (isb., seshini, ukuphepha). Asisebenzisi ama-cookie wokukhangisa avela kwezinye izinhlangothi. Lawula ama-cookie ngezilungiselelo zebrawuza yakho.
Udinga inombolo ye-Chatforia ngaphambi kokwenza izingcingo zocingo.

Chatforia ayidayisi imininingwane yomuntu siqu. Abahlali baseCalifornia basengafaka izicelo ngaphansi kwe-CPRA besebenzisa inkinobho engezansi.

Izinyathelo zokufaka i-eSIM zingahluka ngokuya ngedivayisi. Qiniseka ukuthi i-iPhone yakho ivuliwe futhi iyahambisana ne-eSIM ngaphambi kokuyifaka. Uma ukufakwa okuqondile kungatholakali, sebenzisa imininingwane yokuvula ekhonjiwe ngenhla ku-Izilungiselelo > Ukuselula > Yongeza i-eSIM.
Vula izilungiselelo zedatha yeselula noma yedatha ephathekayo zocingo lwakho.

Le eSIM ayikakabi nesixhumanisi esivumelekile sokufaka.
Kuhle kakhulu ekusetshenzisweni okuqinile kohambo nasekusakazeni.
Idatha ephezulu kakhulu yokuhamba okude nokusetshenziswa okuningi.

Idatha engenamkhawulo yabahambi abangafuni ukukhathazeka ngokusetshenziswa.
Umhlinzeki wakho akanikanga isixhumanisi esivumelekile sokufaka okwamanje. Ungasasebenzisa imininingwane yokusebenzisa ngesandla engezansi lapho itholakala khona.
Gcina le khodi ye-QR iyimfihlo. Noma ubani onokufinyelela angase akwazi ukufaka i-eSIM.

Asikwazanga ukuqala inqubo yokukhokha yohlelo lomndeni. Sicela uzame futhi.

Ujoyine lolu khono. Manje wabelana ngomgodi wabo wedatha.

I-Chatforia uhlelo lokuthumela imilayezo oluqala ngobumfihlo olwenza ingxoxo phakathi kwezilimi zibe lula. Imilayezo ivikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni iye ekugcineni futhi i-app inesixhaso sokuhumusha esakhelwe ngaphakathi esisekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-100 ngesikhathi sangempela. Abasebenzisi bangavumela imilayezo inyamalale, bagcine ukuthola ubufakazi bokufunda kuyinketho, futhi bahlanganise imilayezo kumadivayisi ahlukene. Iyatholakala ku-iOS, Android, naku-webhu.
Kwi-desktop? Skena ngocingo lwakho ukuze uthole uhlelo lokusebenza.
Sizothumela izibuyekezo lapha futhi sibuyekeze usuku oluthi \"Okubuyekezwe ngokugcina\".
I-Chatforia ayihloselwe izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 (noma njengoba kudingeka ngumthetho wendawo yakho).

Hlinzeka futhi uqinisekise ukuphepha kwesevisi (ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi, ukutholwa kwe-spam nokuhlukunyezwa)
Ulwazi lwe-akhawunti (isb., i-imeyili/ifoni) ukuze udale futhi uvikeleke i-akhawunti yakho.
Ukuxilongwa/ukusetshenziswa njengemibhalo yokwehluleka, uhlobo lwedivayisi, noma ukuhlaziywa okujwayelekile ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukusebenza.
Okuqukethwe okuvikelwe (imiyalezo/izingcingo) kuvikelwe kusukela ekuqaleni kuya ekugcineni; asikwazi ukukufunda.

Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ichaza ukuthi i-Chatforia (\"thina\", \"kithi\") iqoqa kanjani, isebenzisa kanjani, futhi yabelana kanjani ngolwazi lapho usebenzisa izinhlelo zethu zokusebenza nezinsizakalo zethu. Sakha i-Chatforia ukuze sinciphise kakhulu idatha esingayifinyelela.
Sigcina kuphela okudingekayo ukuze isevisi isebenze futhi sisebenzisa izindinganiso zokuphepha ezijwayelekile embonini. Okuqukethwe kwe-E2E akukwazi ukudekhwelwa thina.
Kuncike esifundeni sakho (isb., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela ukufinyelela, ukulungisa, ukususa, noma ukuphuma ekucubungulweni okuthile. Xhumana: privacy@chatforia.com.
Asidayisi idatha yomuntu siqu. Singabelana ngedatha encane nabacubunguli (isb., izaziso zokupush, ukuhlaziywa kwedatha) ngaphansi kwezivumelwano eziqinile.

Uma ukhetha ukuhlinzeka inombolo yocingo ephathekayo, siyisebenzisa ukuvumela izici ezifana nokuqinisekisa i-akhawunti, izaziso zokungena, nokuthumela imilayezo kusuka kumsebenzisi kuya kumsebenzisi nge-SMS lapho sekuxhaswa khona. Singathumela imilayezo ye-SMS yokuthengiselana ehlobene ne-akhawunti yakho nemisebenzi yakho ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetha ukungatholi imilayezo ye-SMS nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokuphendula ngokugama elisekelwayo lokuphuma (njenge-\"STOP\") noma ngokushintsha izintandokazi zakho zezaziso kuhlelo lokusebenza. Ukubuyiselwa kwemali kunganikezwa uma kukhona izindleko eziphindwe kabili, amaphutha ekukhokhisweni, noma izinkinga zobuchwepheshe ezivimbela ukufinyelela ezici ezikhokhelwayo. Zonke izicelo zibhekwa ngamunye ngamunye.
E-Chatforia, sizama ukuhlinzeka ngesevisi esezingeni eliphezulu kubo bonke abasebenzisi. Le Nqubomgomo Yokubuyiselwa Kwemali ichaza ukuthi imali ingabuyiselwa nini.
Ngokuvamile asinikezi ukubuyiselwa imali ngesikhathi esingasetshenziswanga, izikhathi zokubhalisa ezingaphelele, noma ukwehluleka ukukhansela ngaphambi kokuvuselelwa.
Ukubhalisa kuyakhokhiswa kusengaphambili njalo ngokuphindaphindiwe. Ungakhansela noma kunini ngokusebenzisa izilungiselelo ze-akhawunti yakho noma ipulatifomu esetshenziselwe ukuthenga.
Uma kuthengeka ngezinye izinkundla ezifana ne-Apple App Store, izicelo zokubuyiselwa imali kumele zenziwe ngqo kulezo zinkundla.
Akuzange kubuyele noma yiziphi iziphakamiso zokubhala kabusha. Zama enye intone.
